title: Travis Kalanick raised $1.7B for his robotics comeback, and Uber chipped in
summary: Atoms Mining puts autonomous machines to work at extraction sites, built on Atoms’ acquisition of Pronto, a startup run by former Uber and Google engineer Anthony Levandowski. Atoms Transport is what Kalanick calls a “wheelbase for robots.” Levandowski’s presence adds intrigue.
caption: output/2026-07-23/travis-kalanick-raised-1-7b-for-his-robotics-comeback-and-uber-chipped.txt
